fields.helpText: This is the number that identifies the entry within the file.  The file contains Federal Procurement Data Systems (FPDS) index codes.
This is the name of the code index. Updated to accept up to four chars  to support the new FPDS report.
This is the code for the index.
This is the year that the Federal Procurement Data Systems (FPDS) index code became effective.

This is a short description of the category defined under the Federal Procurement Data Systems (FPDS) index codes.  The codes are used to track the types of business from which goods are being procured, in order to do reporting to Central Office.

This field will hold the Business Type that is applicable to the Socioeconomic Group for the selected Vendor.    User may enter one or more Business Type.  It will display as 1,2 or 1,3,4 etc..   The user must enter a minimum of 1 character and a maximum of 30 characters.  The system will filter out all the duplicates and any non-numeric characters greater than 4 that might have been used as delimeter or anything else.   The valid Business Types are as follows:                         1 : Smal
